finality.notes: Base has tiered finality. 'latest' = sequencer block (~2s, reorg-able); 'safe' = L1 batch posted (~5-10 min); 'finalized' = Ethereum sign-off (~15-20 min). Cap-mint scope reads default to 'safe' to avoid sequencer-reorg windows; high-value payments should use 'finalized'.

contracts.name: AgentKeysScope
contracts.purpose: per-actor scope grants — services, namespaces, spend/time windows

contracts.name: SidecarRegistry
contracts.purpose: D_pub ↔ (operator_omni, actor_omni, roles) device bindings + K11 cred storage

contracts.name: K3EpochCounter
contracts.purpose: current K3 epoch; bumps trigger signer-side KEK + K4 derivation rotation

contracts.name: CredentialAudit
contracts.purpose: per-actor append-only audit log + tier-2 Merkle root anchor every 2 min

contracts.name: P256Verifier
contracts.purpose: pure-Solidity P-256 (secp256r1) verifier — the P256Router fallback

contracts.name: P256Router
contracts.purpose: precompile-first P-256 verifier (RIP-7212 at 0x100, Solidity fallback) — K11Verifier p256Addr, issue #170

contracts.name: K11Verifier
contracts.purpose: K11 WebAuthn assertion verifier used by scope + registry master mutations

contracts.name: VerifyingPaymaster
contracts.purpose: #164 E6 / #225 — broker-co-signed gas sponsorship for the K11-gated accept UserOp (one shared EntryPoint deposit; the J1 Sybil gate)

contracts.name: EntryPoint
contracts.purpose: ERC-4337 v0.7 EntryPoint — handleOps entry for passkey-account master UserOps

contracts.name: P256AccountFactory
contracts.purpose: CREATE2 factory for P256Account passkey-master smart-accounts; constructor(entryPoint, k11Verifier)
